creator: pkubaj@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Dimitry Andric from comment #8)
Regarding extra-patch-clang_lib_Driver_ToolChains_Clang.cpp, please see 3b5dff3ea583726dca0709140447c653dcc90706. Without that patch, Firefox didn't build. I'm not sure whether it's necessary now, but it surely was before.
